description: Spaarke R2 SSE Event Type Manifest. Lists all server-sent event types emitted by the BFF AI chat streaming endpoints.

events.description: Instructs the AI shell to render or update a workspace widget (document-preview, action-panel, suggestion-list, capability-status).
Notifies the client that the agent's active context has changed (document, entity, conversation, or user-intent).
Instructs the source pane to highlight text ranges in a document (relevant, cited, or conflicting).
Asks the shell to perform a workspace action (navigate, open-document, run-playbook, dismiss) with optional HITL confirmation.
Delivers a batch of follow-up suggestions (action, question, insight) for the SprkChat suggestion bar.
Notifies the client that an AI capability's availability has changed (available, degraded, unavailable).
Carries safety-layer annotations: groundedness scores, citation verification, and content-policy actions (logged, filtered, blocked).
